reviews.review_description: As stated, a very unique and interesting story. Any updates on when volume 2 and 3 are going to be released?

Way too much exposition. Boring.
Interesting art direction.
Virtually zero interaction.

Do better

I am ready for Vol 2
Left off when it was really getting good and wanting to continue. Some interaction and a very interesting story. The journey continues with the next Volume 2. Looking forward to it. Thank you for this adventure.

Interesting story.

As it indicates - it's Volume 1 - so it's not a complete story - hope the other parts will be developed.  So I hope this purchase helps funds the development of Volume 2.

I wish this would lead into a full fledge interactive adventure. It’s like an extended opening credit to what would be an awesome adventure experience.   I did enjoy it.  It’s only 1.99 because  it’s a short experience.  If I didn’t like it I would refund it, but I thought it was cool so hopefully my 1.99 helps fund more development
